news.title: Brigade Hotel Ventures to invest ₹1,000 crore in Karnataka; opens rebranded Kochi hotel
news.para: Brigade Hotel Ventures (BHVL) is set to invest approximately ₹1,000 crore in Karnataka over the next five years for new projects and existing asset modernization. The company also plans a broader expansion, aiming to add 1,700 rooms with a capital outlay of ₹3,600 crore.

news.title: Pune district administration to frame SOP for RMC plants in three weeks
news.para: Pune district administration will finalize a standard operating procedure (SOP) for the ready-mix concrete (RMC) industry within three weeks to address pollution and traffic congestion. Interim restrictions on RMC vehicle movement are in place, with unrestricted movement allowed on Wednesdays, Saturdays, and Sundays, and limited hours on other days. Mandatory nameplates and cameras will be installed on RMC transport vehicles.

news.title: Patna civic body grants ₹40 lakh rebate to early property tax payers
news.para: Patna Municipal Corporation offered Rs 40 lakh tax relief to over 35,000 property owners for early payments.  A 5% rebate is available until June 30.  Despite collecting Rs 11 crore, collections are down from last year.  PMC is urging taxpayers to pay, with defaulters facing 1.5% monthly interest from October.

news.title: Odisha leads India in PMAY-U 2.0 housing completions
news.para: Odisha leads the nation in completing houses under Pradhan Mantri Awas Yojana-Urban (PMAY-U 2.0), consistently securing the top spot since March 2025. The state has achieved significant progress, with 2,008 houses completed and many more underway. This success is credited to strong coordination and swift execution, with officials aiming to finish remaining projects ahead of schedule.

news.title: SBI pitches for review of affordable home definition, cites jump in average loan size
news.para: SBI Chairman C S Setty has urged the government to redefine affordable housing, citing a significant rise in the average home loan size to Rs 51 lakh from Rs 35-40 lakh two years ago. He stated that increasing housing costs necessitate a review of what constitutes an affordable home, impacting policy incentives for lenders.

news.title: RBI imposes penalties on YES Bank, Hinduja Housing Finance
news.para: The Reserve Bank of India has levied a Rs 31.80 lakh penalty on YES Bank for failing to implement a system for using KYC Identifiers for customer relationships. This action follows a supervisory inspection of the bank's financial position as of March 31, 2025. Additionally, Hinduja Housing Finance Ltd was fined Rs 1.8 lakh for governance non-compliance.

news.title: Uttar Pradesh reduces development and building permit fee in Ghaziabad
news.para: The Uttar Pradesh government has slightly reduced development and building permit fees in districts like Ghaziabad. This follows a substantial increase earlier this year. Ghaziabad still holds the highest development fee in the state. The government aims to leverage Ghaziabad's growth potential for infrastructure development.

news.title: Oberoi Realty net profit rises by 12.67% to ₹2,507.43 crore in FY26
news.para: Oberoi Realty has announced a significant 12.67 percent rise in its net consolidated profit for the financial year 2025-26. The company's profit after tax reached ₹2,507.43 crore. Total income also saw a healthy growth of 15.16 percent. The fourth quarter of FY26 demonstrated strong performance with profit after tax surging by 62.36 percent. The company also declared a dividend.

news.title: House prices in UK fall 0.1% in April 2026: Halifax
news.para: UK house prices saw a dip in April, marking the second consecutive monthly fall. Annual price growth slowed to its weakest pace since December. Global events, including the war in Iran, have created uncertainty and pushed up borrowing costs. This has dampened buyer demand across the property market. Other sector indicators also point to weaker demand.

news.title: WorkEZ expands office space portfolio to 1.7 million sq ft
news.para: Work Easy Space Solutions has significantly grown its managed office spaces. The company now operates across 1.7 million square feet. New centers have opened in Chennai and Kochi. An upcoming development is planned for Coimbatore. This expansion strengthens WorkEZ's presence in key Indian cities.

news.title: MediaTek leases 1.04 lakh sq ft space for ₹144 crore from BPTP in Noida
news.para: BPTP has leased a significant office space to Taiwan-based MediaTek in Noida. This marks MediaTek's second research and development hub in India. The deal is valued at approximately ₹144 crore for a 10-year tenure. The new facility aims to expand MediaTek's talent pool and research capabilities. BPTP Capital City is a prime commercial development.

news.title: Orient Electric's net profit rises by 15.18% to ₹95.84 crore in FY26
news.para: Orient Electric, a CKA Birla Group company, reported a 15.18% increase in net consolidated profit for FY26, reaching ₹95.84 crore. Total income grew by 7.43% to ₹3,336.40 crore. The company's board recommended a final dividend of ₹0.75 per equity share, bringing the total dividend for FY26 to ₹1.50.

news.title: Rajasthan auctions nine limestone blocks in April 2026
news.para: Rajasthan has begun its annual mineral auction plan. Nine major limestone blocks were successfully auctioned in April. These blocks are spread across Nagaur, Jaisalmer, and Chittorgarh districts. They hold significant reserves estimated at 920 million tonnes. The state expects to receive substantial upfront payments and over Rs 24,000 crore in revenue over 50 years.

news.title: Cera Sanitaryware's net profit dips 17.16% to ₹204.18 crore in FY26
news.para: Cera Sanitaryware reported a 17.16% decline in net profit for FY26, reaching ₹204.18 crore, despite a 6.33% rise in total income to ₹2,102.97 crore. The company's Q4 FY26 saw a 9.64% dip in profit to ₹77.33 crore, though total income grew by 9.49%. The board recommended a dividend of ₹75 per share.

news.title: Hero Realty raises ₹1,200 crore debt from IndusInd Bank
news.para: Hero Realty has secured a ₹1,200 crore debt facility from IndusInd Bank to fuel its expansion. The company recently launched 'The Palatial by Hero Homes' on the Dwarka Expressway, featuring AI-enabled residences with indoor air purification. HRPL is currently developing over six million sq ft across multiple North Indian states.

news.title: Kochi metro phase-II delayed by a year, rollout now pushed to April 2027
news.para: Kochi Metro's Phase II operations, initially slated for June 2026, are now targeted for April 2027 due to a temporary funding crunch. The delay, caused by a stalled foreign loan, has been resolved with the Asian Infrastructure Investment Bank's approval. The entire 11.2km stretch from JLN Stadium to Infopark will be commissioned in a single phase.

news.title: Adobe leases 1.58 lakh sq ft office at Max Square in Noida
news.para: Adobe has leased around 1.58 lakh sq ft office space at Max Square in Noida and has begun operations from the facility. The move marks one of the larger office leasing transactions in the city and reflects continued expansion of technology firms in NCR.

news.title: TGIIC to auction 11 acres land in Raidurg with upset price of ₹139 crore per acre
news.para: Telangana State Industrial Infrastructure Corporation is set to auction approximately 11 acres of land in Raidurg Panmaktha with a record upset price of Rs 139 crore per acre. The government anticipates pocketing around Rs 2,000 crore from these sales, building on previous successful land auctions in the area.
